name: claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: skill_activation_prompt
prompts.template: Activate the {skill_name} skill on {agent_name} with the following request: {user_prompt}
prompts.use_case: Integrating multi-domain coding skills to augment code generation workflows.

prompts.name: contextual_task_request
prompts.template: Using {skill_name}, perform the task considering this context: {context_data}. Task: {user_prompt}
prompts.use_case: Using marketing and product-specific plugins for automated content and product management tasks.

prompts.name: multi_agent_invoke
prompts.template: Invoke {skill_name} across supported agents including {agent_list} with input: {user_prompt}
prompts.use_case: Applying compliance and C-level advisory skills to ensure alignment with organizational policies.
